title: Slaughter livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Slaughter livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for slaughter

pcs.text: Identify reasons for slaughter and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify reasons for slaughter and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify reasons for slaughter and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and prepare slaughter site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and prepare slaughter site.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Select, check and prepare equipment required to complete livestock slaughter and transport to slaughter site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and prepare equipment required to complete livestock slaughter and transport to slaughter site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and prepare equipment required to complete livestock slaughter and transport to slaughter site.

pcs.text: Select and prepare livestock to be slaughtered according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare livestock to be slaughtered according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare livestock to be slaughtered according to animal welfare practices.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the slaughter method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the slaughter method.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for slaughter

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Bleed animal by severing the major blood vessels safely and hygienically.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dress, hang and protect carcass?

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with all relevant workplace health and safety, public health, hygiene, animal welfare, biosecurity and environment sustainability requirements.
